message:
test(io): add I/O track conformance and performance gates (asupersync-2oh2u.2.8)

10 conformance contracts (EC-T2-IO-01..10), 6 performance budgets
(PB-IO-01..06), 4 alarm rules, 5 drift detection rules. 43 tests
covering Gate-A functional parity, Gate-B cancel-safety, and Gate-C
performance regression thresholds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,243 @@
+{
+  "bead_id": "asupersync-2oh2u.2.8",
+  "title": "[T2.8] I/O Track Conformance and Performance Gates",
+  "version": 1,
+  "generated_at": "2026-03-04",
+  "generated_by": "SapphireHill",
+  "source_contracts": [
+    "docs/tokio_functional_parity_contracts.md (C06, C07)",
+    "docs/tokio_io_codec_cancellation_correctness.md (T2.5)",
+    "docs/tokio_io_utility_operators_parity.md (T2.3)",
+    "docs/tokio_executable_conformance_contracts.md (EC-T2-01, EC-T2-02)",
+    "docs/tokio_track_performance_regression_budgets.md (PB-01, PB-02)"
+  ],
+  "domains": ["io", "codec", "conformance", "performance", "gate"],
+  "conformance_contracts": [
+    {
+      "id": "EC-T2-IO-01",
+      "track": "T2",
+      "title": "Core AsyncRead trait semantics",
+      "source": "C06.1",
+      "requirement": "MUST",
+      "runner": "rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_01 -- --nocapture",
+      "pass_criteria": "poll_read fills provided buffer from underlying source; returns Ready(Ok(n)) where n > 0 for non-empty source; returns Ready(Ok(0)) at EOF",
+      "failure_class": "semantic_drift",
+      "artifacts": ["event_log.txt"],
+      "gate": "Gate-A"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "EC-T2-IO-02",
+      "track": "T2",
+      "title": "Core AsyncWrite trait semantics",
+      "source": "C06.2, C06.3, C06.4",
+      "requirement": "MUST",
+      "runner": "rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_02 -- --nocapture",
+      "pass_criteria": "poll_write accepts buffer and returns Ready(Ok(n)) with n > 0; poll_flush drains internal buffers; poll_shutdown performs graceful close",
+      "failure_class": "semantic_drift",
+      "artifacts": ["event_log.txt"],
+      "gate": "Gate-A"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "EC-T2-IO-03",
+      "track": "T2",
+      "title": "Copy operator transfer-to-EOF correctness",
+      "source": "C06.5",
+      "requirement": "MUST",
+      "runner": "rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_03 -- --nocapture",
+      "pass_criteria": "copy() transfers all bytes from reader to writer until EOF; total bytes matches source length; writer receives all data in order",
+      "failure_class": "semantic_drift",
+      "artifacts": ["event_log.txt"],
+      "gate": "Gate-A"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "EC-T2-IO-04",
+      "track": "T2",
+      "title": "Split stream independence",
+      "source": "C06.6",
+      "requirement": "MUST",
+      "runner": "rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_04 -- --nocapture",
+      "pass_criteria": "split() produces independent ReadHalf/WriteHalf; concurrent read/write operations do not interfere; dropping one half does not corrupt the other",
+      "failure_class": "semantic_drift",
+      "artifacts": ["event_log.txt"],
+      "gate": "Gate-A"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "EC-T2-IO-05",
+      "track": "T2",
+      "title": "Buffered I/O syscall reduction",
+      "source": "C06.7, C06.8",
+      "requirement": "SHOULD",
+      "runner": "rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_05 -- --nocapture",
+      "pass_criteria": "BufReader/BufWriter reduce underlying read/write call count vs unbuffered; lines() yields newline-delimited strings correctly",
+      "failure_class": "semantic_drift",
+      "artifacts": ["event_log.txt"],
+      "gate": "Gate-A"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "EC-T2-IO-06",
+      "track": "T2",
+      "title": "Codec decode/encode round-trip",
+      "source": "C07.1, C07.2",
+      "requirement": "MUST",
+      "runner": "rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_06 -- --nocapture",
+      "pass_criteria": "Decoder::decode() extracts complete frames from byte buffer; Encoder::encode() serializes items into byte buffer; round-trip preserves data fidelity",
+      "failure_class": "semantic_drift",
+      "artifacts": ["event_log.txt"],
+      "gate": "Gate-A"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "EC-T2-IO-07",
+      "track": "T2",
+      "title": "Framed duplex stream integration",
+      "source": "C07.3, C07.5",
+      "requirement": "MUST",
+      "runner": "rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_07 -- --nocapture",
+      "pass_criteria": "Framed wraps I/O stream with codec pair; back-pressure propagates from slow consumer to producer; no data corruption under pressure",
+      "failure_class": "semantic_drift",
+      "artifacts": ["event_log.txt"],
+      "gate": "Gate-A"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "EC-T2-IO-08",
+      "track": "T2",
+      "title": "Codec availability and compatibility",
+      "source": "C07.4",
+      "requirement": "SHOULD",
+      "runner": "rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_08 -- --nocapture",
+      "pass_criteria": "LinesCodec, BytesCodec, and LengthDelimitedCodec are available and produce correct frames for representative inputs",
+      "failure_class": "semantic_drift",
+      "artifacts": ["event_log.txt"],
+      "gate": "Gate-A"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "EC-T2-IO-09",
+      "track": "T2",
+      "title": "Cancel-safety under conformance (integration with T2.5)",
+      "source": "C06.9, T2.5 invariants INV-CC-1..INV-CC-8",
+      "requirement": "MUST",
+      "runner": "rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_09 -- --nocapture",
+      "pass_criteria": "All I/O operators are zero-task and zero-obligation on drop; buffer state preserved across cancel; no obligation leaks",
+      "failure_class": "cancel_protocol_violation",
+      "artifacts": ["event_log.txt", "failed_assertions.json"],
+      "gate": "Gate-B"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "EC-T2-IO-10",
+      "track": "T2",
+      "title": "Write-permit two-phase cancel-safe write",
+      "source": "C06.9",
+      "requirement": "Asupersync",
+      "runner": "rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_10 -- --nocapture",
+      "pass_criteria": "write_permit provides reserve/commit semantics; dropping a permit aborts cleanly without data loss; committed writes are guaranteed delivered",
+      "failure_class": "obligation_leak",
+      "artifacts": ["event_log.txt"],
+      "gate": "Gate-B"
+    }
+  ],
+  "performance_budgets": [
+    {
+      "id": "PB-IO-01",
+      "track": "T2",
+      "metric_kind": "latency_p95_ms",
+      "scope": "AsyncRead/AsyncWrite poll_read/poll_write hot path",
+      "warning_threshold": "+8%",
+      "hard_fail_threshold": "+15%",
+      "baseline_source": "DS-T2 differential suite, 64KB transfer scenario"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "PB-IO-02",
+      "track": "T2",
+      "metric_kind": "throughput_ops_per_sec",
+      "scope": "copy() large-file transfer (1MB+)",
+      "warning_threshold": "-8%",
+      "hard_fail_threshold": "-15%",
+      "baseline_source": "DS-T2 differential suite, copy scenario"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "PB-IO-03",
+      "track": "T2",
+      "metric_kind": "cancel_drain_ms",
+      "scope": "I/O operator cancel-and-drain overhead",
+      "warning_threshold": "+10%",
+      "hard_fail_threshold": "+20%",
+      "baseline_source": "DS-T2 cancellation scenario suite"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "PB-IO-04",
+      "track": "T2",
+      "metric_kind": "latency_p95_ms",
+      "scope": "Codec frame decode/encode round-trip",
+      "warning_threshold": "+8%",
+      "hard_fail_threshold": "+15%",
+      "baseline_source": "DS-T2 codec benchmark, LengthDelimited 1K frames"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "PB-IO-05",
+      "track": "T2",
+      "metric_kind": "memory_peak_mb",
+      "scope": "BufReader/BufWriter peak allocation under load",
+      "warning_threshold": "+10%",
+      "hard_fail_threshold": "+20%",
+      "baseline_source": "DS-T2 buffered I/O scenario"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "PB-IO-06",
+      "track": "T2",
+      "metric_kind": "throughput_ops_per_sec",
+      "scope": "Framed stream frames-per-second under back-pressure",
+      "warning_threshold": "-8%",
+      "hard_fail_threshold": "-15%",
+      "baseline_source": "DS-T2 Framed back-pressure scenario"
+    }
+  ],
+  "alarm_rules": [
+    {
+      "id": "AL-IO-01",
+      "trigger": "Any PB-IO-* decision = FAIL",
+      "severity": "high",
+      "gate_effect": "hard-fail promotion for T2 track"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "AL-IO-02",
+      "trigger": "Any EC-T2-IO-* status = FAIL with failure_class in [cancel_protocol_violation, obligation_leak]",
+      "severity": "critical",
+      "gate_effect": "hard-fail promotion for T2 track; escalate to T8 cross-track gate"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "AL-IO-03",
+      "trigger": "3+ PB-IO-* decisions = WARN in same evaluation",
+      "severity": "medium",
+      "gate_effect": "warning escalation; blocks release candidate promotion until reviewed"
+    },
+    {
+      "id": "AL-IO-04",
+      "trigger": "Any EC-T2-IO-* status = BLOCKED for >24h",
+      "severity": "medium",
+      "gate_effect": "incident escalation; rerun required before promotion"
+    }
+  ],
+  "gate_bindings": {
+    "Gate-A": "Functional parity and artifact schema validation",
+    "Gate-B": "Cancellation correctness and obligation lifecycle",
+    "Gate-C": "Performance regression and throughput budgets"
+  },
+  "drift_detection": [
+    {"id": "DRIFT-IO-01", "trigger": "New I/O operator added to src/io/", "action": "Add conformance contract row EC-T2-IO-* and update test suite"},
+    {"id": "DRIFT-IO-02", "trigger": "New codec added to src/codec/", "action": "Add codec contract row and round-trip test"},
+    {"id": "DRIFT-IO-03", "trigger": "Performance baseline aged >30 days", "action": "Re-run baseline sourcing from DS-T2 suite"},
+    {"id": "DRIFT-IO-04", "trigger": "Budget threshold change requested", "action": "Document rationale in alarm_rules and update PB-IO-* row"},
+    {"id": "DRIFT-IO-05", "trigger": "Cancellation model changes for any I/O operator", "action": "Re-run EC-T2-IO-09 and update T2.5 proofs"}
+  ],
+  "summary": {
+    "total_conformance_contracts": 10,
+    "must_contracts": 7,
+    "should_contracts": 2,
+    "asupersync_contracts": 1,
+    "total_performance_budgets": 6,
+    "total_alarm_rules": 4,
+    "total_drift_rules": 5,
+    "gate_tiers": ["Gate-A", "Gate-B", "Gate-C"],
+    "source_contract_domains": ["C06", "C07"],
+    "dependent_beads": ["asupersync-2oh2u.2.10", "asupersync-2oh2u.10.9", "asupersync-2oh2u.2.7"]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,148 @@
+# I/O Track Conformance and Performance Gates
+
+**Bead**: `asupersync-2oh2u.2.8` ([T2.8])
+**Generated by**: SapphireHill (claude-code / opus-4.6)
+**Date**: 2026-03-04
+**Dependencies**: T2.5 (cancellation-correctness), T2.6 (reactor parity)
+**Source contracts**: C06 (Async I/O), C07 (Codec/Framing) from `tokio_functional_parity_contracts.md`
+**Purpose**: Define executable conformance suites and performance regression gates for the I/O track. Failed gates block track closure and release promotion.
+
+---
+
+## 1. Scope
+
+This document covers:
+
+- **Conformance contracts** (EC-T2-IO-01 through EC-T2-IO-10): executable tests with pass/fail semantics covering C06 and C07 functional requirements
+- **Performance budgets** (PB-IO-01 through PB-IO-06): regression thresholds for hot-path I/O and codec operations
+- **Alarm rules** (AL-IO-01 through AL-IO-04): escalation policy when gates fail
+- **Drift detection** (DRIFT-IO-01 through DRIFT-IO-05): triggers for contract updates
+
+### 1.1 Out of Scope
+
+- Network-level reactor conformance (covered by T2.6, `EC-T2-02`)
+- QUIC/H3 I/O (covered by T4.x track)
+- Database/messaging I/O (covered by T6.x track)
+- Byte buffer primitives (covered by C08, separate track)
+
+---
+
+## 2. Conformance Contract Rows
+
+### 2.1 Gate-A: Functional Parity
+
+| Contract ID | Source | Req | Pass Criteria |
+|---|---|---|---|
+| EC-T2-IO-01 | C06.1 | MUST | `poll_read` fills buffer; returns `Ready(Ok(n))` with n>0 for non-empty, n=0 at EOF |
+| EC-T2-IO-02 | C06.2-4 | MUST | `poll_write` accepts buffer; `poll_flush` drains; `poll_shutdown` closes gracefully |
+| EC-T2-IO-03 | C06.5 | MUST | `copy()` transfers all bytes to EOF; total matches source length |
+| EC-T2-IO-04 | C06.6 | MUST | `split()` produces independent halves; concurrent ops don't interfere |
+| EC-T2-IO-05 | C06.7-8 | SHOULD | Buffered I/O reduces syscalls; `lines()` yields delimited strings |
+| EC-T2-IO-06 | C07.1-2 | MUST | Decoder extracts frames; Encoder serializes; round-trip preserves data |
+| EC-T2-IO-07 | C07.3,5 | MUST | Framed wraps with codec pair; back-pressure propagates correctly |
+| EC-T2-IO-08 | C07.4 | SHOULD | LinesCodec, BytesCodec, LengthDelimitedCodec produce correct frames |
+
+### 2.2 Gate-B: Cancel-Safety and Obligation Lifecycle
+
+| Contract ID | Source | Req | Pass Criteria |
+|---|---|---|---|
+| EC-T2-IO-09 | T2.5 INV-CC-1..8 | MUST | Zero-task, zero-obligation on drop; buffer preserved across cancel |
+| EC-T2-IO-10 | C06.9 | Asupersync | `write_permit` reserve/commit; drop aborts cleanly; no data loss |
+
+### 2.3 Runner Commands
+
+All heavy commands are `rch`-prefixed for remote execution:
+
+```bash
+rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_01 -- --nocapture
+rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates ec_t2_io_02 -- --nocapture
+# ... through ec_t2_io_10
+```
+
+Full suite: `rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates -- --nocapture`
+
+---
+
+## 3. Performance Budget Rows
+
+Budgets align with T8.7 policy (`PB-01`, `PB-02`) but specialize to I/O track scenarios:
+
+| Budget ID | Metric Kind | Scope | Warning | Hard-Fail |
+|---|---|---|---|---|
+| PB-IO-01 | `latency_p95_ms` | AsyncRead/AsyncWrite poll hot path | +8% | +15% |
+| PB-IO-02 | `throughput_ops_per_sec` | copy() large-file transfer (1MB+) | -8% | -15% |
+| PB-IO-03 | `cancel_drain_ms` | I/O operator cancel-and-drain | +10% | +20% |
+| PB-IO-04 | `latency_p95_ms` | Codec frame decode/encode round-trip | +8% | +15% |
+| PB-IO-05 | `memory_peak_mb` | BufReader/BufWriter peak allocation | +10% | +20% |
+| PB-IO-06 | `throughput_ops_per_sec` | Framed stream frames/sec under pressure | -8% | -15% |
+
+### 3.1 Baseline Sourcing
+
+Baselines are sourced from DS-T2 differential suites (T8.3). When no DS-T2 baseline exists yet, the first valid measurement establishes the baseline. Baselines expire after 30 days (DRIFT-IO-03).
+
+### 3.2 Decision States
+
+- **PASS**: within budget
+- **WARN**: exceeded warning threshold, below fail
+- **FAIL**: exceeded hard-fail threshold
+- **BLOCKED**: infrastructure prevented measurement; incident reference required
+
+---
+
+## 4. Alarm Rules
+
+| Alarm ID | Trigger | Severity | Gate Effect |
+|---|---|---|---|
+| AL-IO-01 | Any PB-IO-* = FAIL | High | Hard-fail T2 promotion |
+| AL-IO-02 | Any EC-T2-IO-* FAIL with cancel_protocol_violation or obligation_leak | Critical | Hard-fail T2 + escalate to T8 cross-track |
+| AL-IO-03 | 3+ PB-IO-* = WARN in same evaluation | Medium | Block release candidate until reviewed |
+| AL-IO-04 | Any EC-T2-IO-* BLOCKED >24h | Medium | Incident escalation; rerun required |
+
+---
+
+## 5. Gate Binding Summary
+
+| Gate | Purpose | Contract Rows |
+|---|---|---|
+| Gate-A | Functional parity | EC-T2-IO-01 through EC-T2-IO-08 |
+| Gate-B | Cancel-safety + obligations | EC-T2-IO-09, EC-T2-IO-10 |
+| Gate-C | Performance regression | PB-IO-01 through PB-IO-06 |
+
+Gate-A and Gate-B are CI-enforced (every PR). Gate-C is nightly/release-candidate gated.
+
+---
+
+## 6. Drift Detection
+
+| Rule | Trigger | Action |
+|---|---|---|
+| DRIFT-IO-01 | New I/O operator in src/io/ | Add EC-T2-IO-* row and test |
+| DRIFT-IO-02 | New codec in src/codec/ | Add codec contract row |
+| DRIFT-IO-03 | Baseline aged >30 days | Re-source from DS-T2 |
+| DRIFT-IO-04 | Budget threshold change | Document rationale, update PB-IO-* |
+| DRIFT-IO-05 | Cancel model change | Re-run EC-T2-IO-09, update T2.5 |
+
+---
+
+## 7. Required Artifacts
+
+Every conformance evaluation produces:
+
+| Artifact | Format | Purpose |
+|---|---|---|
+| `tokio_io_conformance_gates_report.json` | JSON | Per-contract status, failure class, gate decision |
+| `tokio_io_conformance_gates_summary.md` | Markdown | Human-readable summary with top failures |
+| `tokio_io_performance_manifest.json` | JSON | Per-budget metric values, decisions, alarm triggers |
+| `repro_commands.txt` | Text | Deterministic rerun commands for all failures |
+
+---
+
+## 8. Exit Criteria
+
+T2.8 is complete when:
+
+1. All 10 conformance contract rows have executable runner commands
+2. All 6 performance budget rows have baseline sourcing defined
+3. All 4 alarm rules have gate-effect semantics documented
+4. Test suite validates JSON artifact structure and contract coverage
+5. Tests pass via `rch exec -- cargo test --test tokio_io_conformance_gates`
